description:
`packages/core/src/tools/component.ts` is at ~78.54% statement coverage (below the 80% threshold). Uncovered branches are at lines ~346-349 and ~352-355, which correspond to `get_prop_constraints` and `find_components_by_token` tool dispatch paths.

**Fix:** Add tests in `tests/tools/component.test.ts` (or a new file) covering:
- `get_prop_constraints` — property with no constraints defined
- `get_prop_constraints` — component not found
- `find_components_by_token` — token that matches no components
- `find_components_by_token` — token that matches multiple components

**Acceptance criteria:**
- `component.ts` statement coverage ≥ 80%
- All new tests pass
- `pnpm test:coverage` shows green thresholds

**PR #33 open — 2 CodeRabbit fixes required before merge:**
1. Run Prettier on `tests/tools/component.test.ts` (CI format check failing)
2. In the "component not found" test, change `throw new Error(...)` to `throw new MCPError(..., ErrorCategory.NOT_FOUND)` to match the actual error shape from `packages/core/src/handlers/cem.ts`
title: fix: add edge case tests for get_prop_constraints and find_components_by_token
